scope: wave2 fan-out migration, COMPLETE: all 4 legacy streams are now migrated at Tier 1. The occurrences sub-resource fan-out (list /issues, then GET /issues/{id}/occurrences per issue) uses the S4 engine mini-wave's stream.fan_out primitive (ids_from.request + into.path_var), closing the gap that previously required a Tier-2 StreamHook.
